---
title: "About the Project"
output: html_document
---

<br>

### Resources

For detailed documentation, vignettes, and source code, visit the package website: **[anonymous-peer-2026.github.io/sspLNIRT](https://github.com/anonymous-peer-2026/sspLNIRT/)**

### Contributors

-   Anonymous Author

### Citation

Please cite `sspLNIRT` if you use it. To cite the software, use:

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
print(citation("sspLNIRT"), style = "text")
```

Or copy the reference information to your BibTeX file:

```bibtex
@Manual{,
    title = {sspLNIRT: Sample Size Planning for Item Calibration using the Joint Hierarchical Model},
    author = {Anonymous Author},
    year = {2026},
    note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},
    url = {https://github.com/anonymous-peer-2026/sspLNIRT},
  }
```

### Questions and Comments

If you have any questions or comments please write to Anonymous Author to the following email address: [anonymous@example.com](mailto:anonymous@example.com)

Or submit an issue on the apps Github page: <https://github.com/anonymous-peer-2026/sspLNIRT/issues>

### Version

You are using version: `r read.dcf(
  file = system.file("DESCRIPTION", package = "sspLNIRT"),
  fields = "Version"
)[1]`
